message:
🐛 Fix rocket scroll with document-level wheel throttle (#150)

- Move wheel handler from container refs to document capture phase
- Throttle at 100ms (10 events/sec) — blocks excess macOS momentum events
- Allowed events pass through to xterm.js for normal scroll and tmux scroll mode
- Targets only .xterm elements via closest() check
- No dependency on React state (tileActive/refs) — works in all modes
- Verified: 50 rapid events → only 5 pass through, terminal stays stable

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
